# UC-18.3.6 · ACI Multi-Site Contract Deny and Drop Statistics on VXLAN-EVPN Intersite Paths — Shadow EPG Enforcement, NDO Stretched Contract Gaps, IPN/ISN Overlay Policy Forensics

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Advanced &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Security, Configuration, Fault &middot; **Wave:** Walk &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We ring a bell when the handoff between two linked sites turns visitors away at the border more than usual, so teams mend stretched agreements before quiet failures spread to apps in another building.*

---

## Description

Correlates **inter-site** **Cisco ACI** **contract** **deny** and **drop** signals carried across **VXLAN** fabrics that stretch **EPGs** between **pods** or **sites** via **IPN**/**ISN** underlays and **EVPN** control planes: **`actrlRuleHit5min`** hardware counters filtered toward **multi-pod**/**shadow**/**remote** **DN** motifs, **`acllogDropL3Pkt`** per-flow **denies** with **five-tuple** forensics, **`cisco:aci:multisite`** **NDO**/**APIC** metadata for **stretched** **providers**/**consumers** and **shadow** **EPG** **pcTags**, and **syslog**/**faultInst** codes **F1394**/**F2301** that surface **policy** **enforcement** failures at **site** **boundaries**. The objective is **overlay-aware** **policy** **gap** detection where **VXLAN** **VNIs** preserve **scope** but **compiled** **rules** lag **orchestrator** **intent**, not re-deriving **UC-18.1.9** **permit/deny** **ratios** on **intra-site-only** traffic.

## Value

When **stretched** **contracts** mis-compile on **remote** **leafs**, **revenue** workloads **fail** **quietly** across **WAN** **hops** while **single-site** dashboards stay **green**—**database** **replication**, **multi-site** **Kubernetes** **APIs**, and **shared** **storage** **replication** **stall** **without** the **blunt** **symptoms** **security** **teams** expect from **edge** **firewalls**. **Spotting** **cross-site** **deny** **bursts** **within** **minutes** **shortens** **mean-time-to-repair** for **orchestrator**-driven **changes**, **documents** **which** **tenant** **subjects** **need** **rollback**, and **gives** **audit** **stakeholders** **defensible** **evidence** that **segmentation** **held** (or **failed**) **exactly** at **fabric** **handoffs** **where** **regulators** **care** **most**.

## Implementation

Deploy **Splunk_TA_cisco-aci** (**4022**) for syslog/fault normalization; add **rest_ta** (**1546**) poll cycles for **actrlRuleHit5min**, **acllog** MOs, **multisite**/NDO JSON, and **faultInst**; normalize five **`cisco:aci:*`** sourcetypes into **`index=cisco_aci`**; enable **statsEnabled** and **ACL logging** on stretched **vzSubj** rows; schedule **`aci_uc1836_intersite_contract_deny_core`** every five minutes with **`aci_maint_intersite.csv`** suppression.

## Evidence

Saved search **`aci_uc1836_intersite_contract_deny_core`** on **`index=cisco_aci`** merging **`cisco:aci:contract_stats`**, **`cisco:aci:acl_log`**, **`cisco:aci:multisite`**, **`cisco:aci:syslog`**, **`cisco:aci:fault`** plus Dashboard Studio workbook tokens **`tok_tenant`**, **`tok_site_pair`**, **`tok_contract_path`**.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

After NDO publishes a stretched contract, a mis-ordered shadow EPG binding leaves remote leaf TCAM with lingering deny actrlRule hits; Splunk shows rising deny_weight_sum with risk_shadow_gap set while cisco:aci:multisite events claim deploy success and F2301 faults appear within the same window.

### Negative scenario

UC-18.1.9 ratio searches on intra-site EPG pairs drift because a vzTaboo contract intentionally blocks scanner traffic, but intersite_hint stays local_maybe, multisite lanes are idle, and this correlation returns zero rows because no cross-site DN motifs or orch_meta penalties fired.

## Detailed Implementation

### Prerequisites
- **Splunk 9.2+** or **Splunk Cloud** search heads need enough concurrency for fifteen-minute correlation across `index=cisco_aci` (rename per your index layout) without starving interactive users—reserve roughly thirty percent of scheduled search slots for this multisource join during incidents.
- Install **Splunk_TA_cisco-aci** (Splunkbase **4022**) wherever APIC syslog lands so **`sourcetype=cisco:aci:syslog`** carries normalized **F1394** and **F2301** strings; the TA does not poll **contract statistics**, so also deploy rest_ta (Splunkbase **1546**) or a hardened Python modular input authenticated with **`/api/aaaLogin.json`** and rotating **`/api/aaaRefresh.json`** cookies.
- Operate against Cisco APIC clusters on 6.0(x), 6.1(x), or 6.2(x) participating in ACI Multi-Site with **Nexus Dashboard Orchestrator (NDO)** publishing schemas; collectors require HTTPS 443/tcp to every site APIC under monitoring, not only the **NDO** cluster VIP, because **actrlRule** counters are read per fabric.
- Turn on **statsEnabled=true** for stretched **vzSubj** instances tied to contracts that cross pods or sites—without statistics, **`actrlRuleHit5min`** remains zero while the data plane still drops packets under implicit deny pressure.
- **RBAC** principle: give automation identities read-only rights to **`/api/class/actrlRuleHit5min.json`**, **`acllogDropL3Pkt.json`**, **`acllogPermitL3Pkt.json`**, `faultInst.json`, and **NDO** audit endpoints feeding **`cisco:aci:multisite`**; never share those identities with interactive admins whose password rotations break refresh tokens mid-poll.
- Prerequisite hygiene: implement **UC-18.1.17** dashboards first so you can tell schema drift from pure contract issues when this search raises **`risk_shadow_gap`** flags.

### Step 1 — Configure data collection
(1) **`cisco:aci:contract_stats`** — HTTPS GET **`/api/class/actrlRuleHit5min.json?rsp-subtree-include=stats`** every sixty to one hundred twenty seconds; normalize dn, actEntry, ingrPkts, egrPkts, sClass, dClass, fltId, and scopeId; stamp `collector_site` at ingest to deduplicate overlapping forwarders.
(2) **`cisco:aci:acl_log`** — Poll **`acllogDropL3Pkt`** and optional **`acllogPermitL3Pkt`** every sixty to one hundred eighty seconds; preserve sIp, dIp, sProt, dProt, prot, plus the parent **actrlRule** DN so five-tuples roll up to tenant contract subjects that may be stretched.
(3) **`cisco:aci:multisite`** — Stream **NDO** or **APIC** exports that list shadow EPG bindings, fvRsProv/fvRsCons relationships, l3extOut/l3extInstP attachments, and deployment phases after templates sync—either REST subtree pulls or orchestrator webhooks translated into newline JSON.
(4) **`cisco:aci:syslog`** — Retain lines mentioning implicitRule, **F1394**, **F2301**, shadow EPG, or multiSite narratives; lightweight **props.conf** filters cut noise but keep enough raw context for fuzzy joins when REST faults.
(5) **`cisco:aci:fault`** — Poll `faultInst` filtered to at least **F1394** (policy enforcement pressure) and **F2301** (binding or deployment failures) with severity you map into `fault_code` fields for Splunk.
(6) Volume planning: inter-site rules are a fraction of total **TCAM** entries, yet acl_log can spike to tens of thousands of events per minute during scanners—size hot buckets for fourteen to thirty days and summarize to a metrics or summary index nightly for executives.

### Step 2 — Create the search and alert
Publish saved search **`aci_uc1836_intersite_contract_deny_core`** on cron ***/5 * * * *** with `earliest=-24h@m`; throttle alerts fifteen minutes per tuple **`tenant_tag` + `intersite_lane`** using **`throttle`/`suppress`** actions or a **KVStore** dedup helper. Expose thresholds via macros **`flow_weight`** (default twenty-five), **`orch_penalty`** floor (fifty), and **`deny_flood`** cutoff (seven hundred fifty) so operators tune without editing raw SPL.

```spl
index=cisco_aci earliest=-24h@m
(
  (sourcetype="cisco:aci:contract_stats" AND match(lower(coalesce(dn,distinguished_name,rule_dn,"")),"implicitrule|shadow|remote|intersite|fvremote|/pod-"))
  OR sourcetype="cisco:aci:multisite"
  OR (sourcetype="cisco:aci:acl_log" AND match(lower(coalesce(action,acl_action,rule_action,"")),"deny|drop"))
  OR (sourcetype="cisco:aci:syslog" AND match(_raw,"(?i)(F1394|F2301|shadow.?epg|intersite|implicitrule)"))
  OR (sourcetype="cisco:aci:fault" AND match(_raw,"(?i)(F1394|F2301)"))
)
| eval dn_lc=lower(trim(coalesce(dn,distinguished_name,rule_dn,rule_dn_flow,"")))
| rex field=dn_lc "tn-(?<tenant_tag>[^/]+)"
| rex field=dn_lc "brc-(?<contract_tag>[^/]+)"
| rex field=dn_lc "subj-(?<subject_tag>[^/]+)"
| eval contract_path=tenant_tag."/".contract_tag."/".subject_tag
| eval lane=case(
    sourcetype=="cisco:aci:contract_stats","stats",
    sourcetype=="cisco:aci:acl_log","flow",
    sourcetype=="cisco:aci:multisite","orch",
    sourcetype=="cisco:aci:syslog","sf",
    sourcetype=="cisco:aci:fault","fi",
    1=1,"misc")
| eval intersite_hint=case(
    match(dn_lc,"/pod-[0-9]+/.*/pod-"),"mpod",
    match(dn_lc,"shadow|fvremote|intersite|isn|ipn"),"isn_ipn",
    sourcetype=="cisco:aci:multisite","orch_meta",
    match(lower(coalesce(policy_site,pair_name,intersite_pair,"")),"site"),"meta_pair",
    1=1,"local_maybe")
| eval act_lc=lower(trim(coalesce(actEntry,action,rule_action,"")))
| eval deny_delta=tonumber(coalesce(deny_delta,denyPkts,delta_ingr,ingrPkts,0))
| eval flow_penalty=if(lane=="flow" AND match(act_lc,"deny|drop"),25,0)
| eval stats_penalty=if(lane=="stats" AND match(act_lc,"deny") AND deny_delta>0,deny_delta,0)
| eval orch_penalty=if(lane=="orch" AND match(lower(coalesce(deployment_status,deploy_state,outcome,"")),"success|deployed") AND match(lower(coalesce(hint_code,deploy_hint,change_summary,"")),"contract|shadow|epg"),50,0)
| eval fault_penalty=if(lane IN ("sf","fi"),200,0)
| eval deny_weight=stats_penalty+flow_penalty+orch_penalty+fault_penalty
| eval site_pair=trim(coalesce(src_site,dst_site,site_pair,policy_site,pair_name,"unknown_pair"))
| bin _time span=15m as win15
| stats sum(deny_weight) as deny_weight_sum dc(dn_lc) as rule_dc max(fault_penalty) as fault_peak values(intersite_hint) as lane_vals values(fault_code) as fault_codes latest(site_pair) as site_pair_latest by win15 tenant_tag contract_path intersite_hint
| eval risk_shadow_gap=if(mvfind(lane_vals,"orch_meta")>=0 AND deny_weight_sum>400 AND fault_peak<200,1,0)
| eval risk_fault_pair=if(fault_peak>0 OR mvcount(fault_codes)>0,1,0)
| eval deny_flood=if(deny_weight_sum>750,1,0)
| where deny_flood=1 OR risk_shadow_gap=1 OR risk_fault_pair=1
| eval intersite_lane=mvindex(mvsort(mvdedup(lane_vals)),0)
| sort - deny_weight_sum - risk_fault_pair
| head 220
| table win15 tenant_tag contract_path intersite_lane site_pair_latest deny_weight_sum rule_dc risk_shadow_gap risk_fault_pair fault_codes
```

**Understanding this SPL** — The first Boolean group intentionally limits sourcetypes to the five contract-focused lanes so searches stay parallel-safe on busy search heads. **`intersite_hint`** marks mpod, isn_ipn, orch_meta, or meta_pair paths, steering analysts away from repeating **UC-18.1.9** ratio mathematics on purely local EPG pairs. **`deny_weight`** blends hardware deny deltas, scaled flow log penalties, orchestration contradictions, and fault spikes so one number ranks cross-site risk. **`risk_shadow_gap`** surfaces successful **NDO** deploy keywords coinciding with rising denies—often shadow EPG compilation lag rather than malicious traffic. **`risk_fault_pair`** elevates rows where faultInst or syslog lanes already recorded **F1394**/**F2301**, signaling APIC-visible breakage.

**Pipeline walkthrough** — After `dn_lc` lowers and trims rule DNs, rex statements extract **tenant_tag**, contract_tag, and subject_tag segments mirrored in **UC-18.1.9** for family consistency. Stats lane treats `act_lc` deny patterns with positive **`deny_delta`**; if collectors only store cumulative counters, pre-compute deltas on the forwarder or wrap this search with `streamstats` by dn in a macro. Flow lane multiplies drop rows by `flow_weight` to keep syslog-heavy fabrics comparable to counter feeds. Orch lane adds weight when **deployment_status** reads success while `hint_code` mentions shadow/**EPG** churn—rename `hint_code` fields to match your **`cisco:aci:multisite`** schema. Final `stats` collapses to win15 buckets grouped by **tenant_tag**, **contract_path**, and **intersite_hint**, emitting **`deny_weight_sum`**, `rule_dc`, **`risk_shadow_gap`**, and **`risk_fault_pair`**.

### Step 3 — Validate
(1) In **APIC**, open **Tenants → {tenant} → Contracts → {contract} → Subjects → Statistics** for a stretched subject and compare rolling deny counters with **`win15 deny_weight_sum`**—match within one poll interval if **statsEnabled** is true.
(2) In **NDO**, review **Schemas → Deploy History** whenever **`risk_shadow_gap`** fires; lingering Out-of-Sync badges on a remote site mean orchestrator backlog, not automatically a mis-built filter.
(3) On a leaf CLI, run **`show zoning-rule`** filtered toward sClass/dClass pcTags exported from Splunk; confirm deny actions reference inter-site programming paths rather than obsolete intra-pod leftovers after moves.
(4) Run **`timechart count by sourcetype` over forty-eight hours**—a flatline on **`cisco:aci:multisite`** during documented **NDO** pushes indicates broken collectors, not a clean bill of health.
(5) Take one **acllog** five-tuple and validate **forward and reverse** routing across IPN/ISN underlays; asymmetric reachability may inflate denies even when contracts look correct—document those outcomes in the runbook pointer to underlay teams.

### Step 4 — Operationalize
(1) Dashboard row one: stacked **`deny_weight_sum`** by **`intersite_lane`** with **`contract_path`** drilldowns into **acllog** detail.
(2) Row two: heatmap of **`site_pair_latest`** versus hour with **`risk_shadow_gap`** annotations and **NDO** template version text fields.
(3) Row three: single-value tiles for active **F2301** counts with deep links into APIC Faults pages filtered by tenant DN.
(4) Runbook hooks: route **`risk_shadow_gap`** pages to **multi-site platform** on-call, **`risk_fault_pair`** to fabric L2/L3 engineers, and flow-only surges without faults to **security analytics** before application owners.
(5) Store SPL and macro definitions in Git with required reviewers; join **`aci_site_pair_owner.csv`** (site pair to owner team) so alert actions include accountable names.

### Step 5 — Alert design, visualization tuning, and troubleshooting
Alert design — Primary correlation triggers when **`deny_flood=1 OR risk_shadow_gap=1 OR risk_fault_pair=1`** after subtracting a seven-day rolling baseline per **`contract_path`** if you enabled baseline macros (optional). Apply suppression using **`lookup aci_maint_intersite.csv`** where `site_pair` matches and `_time` sits between `window_start` and `window_end` epoch columns derived from change management. Send weekly digest emails summarizing the top ten **`contract_path`** values by integrated **`deny_weight_sum`** for architecture councils reviewing stretched policy.

Visualization — Cap chart series at the fifteen busiest **`contract_path`** entries using post-processing `head` to preserve readability; color mpod amber, isn_ipn teal, orch_meta violet, and overlay fault icons when **`risk_fault_pair=1`**. Use Dashboard Studio conditional formatting to flip tiles red when **`deny_weight_sum`** exceeds twice the trailing weekly median for that tenant.

Troubleshoot — No multisite events during NDO work → inspect collector credentials and `mso/api` reachability; HTTP 401 loops mute **`risk_shadow_gap`**. Symmetric denies across every tenant → suspect duplicate ingestion doubling **`actrlRuleHit5min`** snapshots—**`dedup host,_cd,dn`** in diagnostics. **Analysts asking for permit/deny ratios** → direct them to **UC-18.1.9**; this UC isolates **cross-site contract enforcement** and VXLAN-carried **EPG** reachability across pods, not local ratio baselines. **Stuck zero weight despite complaints** → reconfirm **statsEnabled**, ACL logging, and **`acllog` retention** filters that might drop remote-site legs.


## SPL

```spl
index=cisco_aci earliest=-24h@m
(
  (sourcetype="cisco:aci:contract_stats" AND match(lower(coalesce(dn,distinguished_name,rule_dn,"")),"implicitrule|shadow|remote|intersite|fvremote|/pod-"))
  OR sourcetype="cisco:aci:multisite"
  OR (sourcetype="cisco:aci:acl_log" AND match(lower(coalesce(action,acl_action,rule_action,"")),"deny|drop"))
  OR (sourcetype="cisco:aci:syslog" AND match(_raw,"(?i)(F1394|F2301|shadow.?epg|intersite|implicitrule)"))
  OR (sourcetype="cisco:aci:fault" AND match(_raw,"(?i)(F1394|F2301)"))
)
| eval dn_lc=lower(trim(coalesce(dn,distinguished_name,rule_dn,rule_dn_flow,"")))
| rex field=dn_lc "tn-(?<tenant_tag>[^/]+)"
| rex field=dn_lc "brc-(?<contract_tag>[^/]+)"
| rex field=dn_lc "subj-(?<subject_tag>[^/]+)"
| eval contract_path=tenant_tag."/".contract_tag."/".subject_tag
| eval lane=case(
    sourcetype=="cisco:aci:contract_stats","stats",
    sourcetype=="cisco:aci:acl_log","flow",
    sourcetype=="cisco:aci:multisite","orch",
    sourcetype=="cisco:aci:syslog","sf",
    sourcetype=="cisco:aci:fault","fi",
    1=1,"misc")
| eval intersite_hint=case(
    match(dn_lc,"/pod-[0-9]+/.*/pod-"),"mpod",
    match(dn_lc,"shadow|fvremote|intersite|isn|ipn"),"isn_ipn",
    sourcetype=="cisco:aci:multisite","orch_meta",
    match(lower(coalesce(policy_site,pair_name,intersite_pair,"")),"site"),"meta_pair",
    1=1,"local_maybe")
| eval act_lc=lower(trim(coalesce(actEntry,action,rule_action,"")))
| eval deny_delta=tonumber(coalesce(deny_delta,denyPkts,delta_ingr,ingrPkts,0))
| eval flow_penalty=if(lane=="flow" AND match(act_lc,"deny|drop"),25,0)
| eval stats_penalty=if(lane=="stats" AND match(act_lc,"deny") AND deny_delta>0,deny_delta,0)
| eval orch_penalty=if(lane=="orch" AND match(lower(coalesce(deployment_status,deploy_state,outcome,"")),"success|deployed") AND match(lower(coalesce(hint_code,deploy_hint,change_summary,"")),"contract|shadow|epg"),50,0)
| eval fault_penalty=if(lane IN ("sf","fi"),200,0)
| eval deny_weight=stats_penalty+flow_penalty+orch_penalty+fault_penalty
| eval site_pair=trim(coalesce(src_site,dst_site,site_pair,policy_site,pair_name,"unknown_pair"))
| bin _time span=15m as win15
| stats sum(deny_weight) as deny_weight_sum dc(dn_lc) as rule_dc max(fault_penalty) as fault_peak values(intersite_hint) as lane_vals values(fault_code) as fault_codes latest(site_pair) as site_pair_latest by win15 tenant_tag contract_path intersite_hint
| eval risk_shadow_gap=if(mvfind(lane_vals,"orch_meta")>=0 AND deny_weight_sum>400 AND fault_peak<200,1,0)
| eval risk_fault_pair=if(fault_peak>0 OR mvcount(fault_codes)>0,1,0)
| eval deny_flood=if(deny_weight_sum>750,1,0)
| where deny_flood=1 OR risk_shadow_gap=1 OR risk_fault_pair=1
| eval intersite_lane=mvindex(mvsort(mvdedup(lane_vals)),0)
| sort - deny_weight_sum - risk_fault_pair
| head 220
| table win15 tenant_tag contract_path intersite_lane site_pair_latest deny_weight_sum rule_dc risk_shadow_gap risk_fault_pair fault_codes
```

## Visualization

(1) **Stacked column** — **`deny_weight_sum`** by **`intersite_lane`** over **`win15`**. (2) **Heatmap** — **`site_pair`** × hour with **`risk_shadow_gap`** overlay. (3) **Table** — top **`contract_path`** with **`rule_dc`**, **`fault_codes`**, drill to **acllog** five-tuples. (4) **Single value** — active **`risk_fault_pair`** count with **APIC** Faults deep link. (5) **Sankey** (optional) — **`tenant_tag`** to **`site_pair`** to **`contract_path`** for leadership summaries.

## Known False Positives

• **intersite_contract_rehome** — Planned EPG moves between sites or pods deliberately tear down stretched consumer/provider bindings, so deny counters climb until shadow objects finish reprogramming; align operations alerts with change tickets by tagging maintenance windows in **`aci_maint_intersite.csv`** and **`lookup`** suppressions until NDO shows consistent deploy-success markers.

• **ndo_shadow_epg_lag** — NDO may mark templates deployed while remote leaf TCAM entries for shadow EPG pcTags still compile, producing a ten-to-one-hundred twenty second burst of denies unrelated to attacks; require two consecutive **`risk_shadow_gap`** windows or corroborating leaf **`show zoning-rule`** deltas before paging and document **`ndo_shadow_epg_lag`** in tickets.

• **ipn_acl_sampling_gap** — When IPN/ISN transports enable NetFlow or sFlow sampling but **`cisco:aci:acl_log`** inputs throttle drop logging to one-per-flow caches, analysts undercount real denies; compare **`cisco:aci:contract_stats`** counters before lowering thresholds and widen polling budgets if finance approves.

• **mislabeled_consumer_facing** — Operators occasionally attach consumer contracts facing the wrong EPG after migrations, so traffic crosses WAN legs yet meets implicit deny counters resembling inter-site failures; cross-check **fvRsCons** rows in **`cisco:aci:multisite`** outputs and use **`mislabeled_consumer_facing`** tags after audit fixes rather than hardware replacements.

• **statsenabled_cold_site** — A site whose vzSubj never enabled **statsEnabled** emits zero **`actrlRuleHit5min`** rows while syslog still shows implicit deny chatter; resolve by enabling statistics and backfilling baselines—track with a separate discovery search, not by muting this correlation.

• **symmetric_routing_asym_policy** — Return-path asymmetry across WAN ECMP may send packets through spines lacking the expected contract view, yielding deny spikes that reverse once BGP preferences settle; correlate with underlay IGP/BGP change records and apply **`symmetric_routing_asym_policy`** suppression tokens tied to carrier maintenance tickets.

• **golden_image_epg_reimage** — Golden-image VM redeployments can clone MAC/IP patterns that momentarily violate stretched filters until reinstall completes; **`golden_image_epg_reimage`** tags from compute teams prevent noisy **`deny_flood`** pages during image refresh waves.

• **compressed_audit_window** — Quarterly audit scans hammer many ports rapidly, driving acl_log volume without strategic risk; filter scanner subnets with **`where NOT cidrmatch("10.50.0.0/16",src)`** clauses or an **`audit_scanner_allow.csv`** **`lookup`** so **`compressed_audit_window`** noise drops out of paging.

- [Splunk Add-on for Cisco ACI (Splunkbase 4022)](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/4022)
- [Splunk REST API Modular Input (Splunkbase 1546)](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/1546)
- [Cisco Nexus Dashboard Orchestrator Configuration Guide](https://www.cisco.com/c/en/us/td/docs/dcn/nd/3-x/orchestrator/configuration/guide/b-cisco-nexus-dashboard-orchestrator-configuration-guide/b-cisco-nexus-dashboard-orchestrator-configuration-guide-chapter-01.html)
